Persian Kittens
Raised with Heart

Discover the beauty, grace, and gentle nature of Persian cats. Our kittens are socialized from day one and ready to become your new family member.

View Kittens Why Persians?

Why Persian Cats?

  • Calm, affectionate personalities
  • Great with families & children
  • Low-key, indoor companions
  • Luxurious, soft coats
Learn More

Meet Our Cats

Our breeding cats are chosen for health, temperament, and beauty.

Bella
Persian Cat

Gentle, nurturing, and the heart of our cattery.

Leo
Persian Cat

Playful, affectionate, and a true gentleman.

Kitten Care Tips

  • Feed a high-quality, breed-appropriate diet
  • Brush daily to prevent matting
  • Schedule regular vet checkups
  • Provide lots of love and gentle play
More Care Tips
What Our Families Say

Stories from Persian cat lovers who’ve welcomed our kittens into their families.

"Our kitten is very sweet and also well-adjusted. The breeder's support made a lot of difference. Great experience!"

Jane Smith

Austin, TX

"We really loved the regular updates and photos. Our Persian cat is the perfect addition to our happy family!"

Nguyen Minh

San Diego, CA

"Our kitten arrived very healthy, playful, and clearly well-loved. We couldn't have asked for a better experience!"

Jack Smith

Atlanta, GA

Subscribe to our newsletter for updates on upcoming litters, care tips, and stories from our family — straight to your inbox.
